creator: joseph.scott@owp.csus.edu
text:
On Wed, 18 Jul 2001, Sheldon Hearn wrote:
 
 # 
 # 
 # On Tue, 17 Jul 2001 08:23:37 MST, Joseph Scott wrote:
 # 
 # > 	Ok, well, at least I wasn't missing something simple then.  If you
 # > can write out an outline of the steps it takes to make this happen it
 # > would help me to generate more complete PRs in the future.  It might also
 # > make a nice addition to the porters handbook.
 # 
 # It's not an automated process.  It involves vi, sed, awk, and whetever
 # else is needed, depending on the install log.
 
 	Well, my sed and awk skills are small, vi is my editor of
 choice.  I had not anticipated it being and automated process, I'm just
 curious as to what steps you use that work so that in the future I have
 something to reference.
 
 # Describing the process means doing it, which means time.  Like I said,
 # if you want me to do this, you'll need to give me a week or so.
 
 	Understood.  Whenever you get a chance would be fine.
 
 -Joseph
